plans.title: SDD Explorer
plans.description: Create the first read-only workbench screen. It should load the current project's SDD snapshot and expose constitution, specs, plans, tasks, and diagram source files through the existing read-only SDD backend endpoints.

tasks.title: Add a dev-mode workbench entry point in MaterialApp.builder
tasks.description: Add a dev-mode workbench entry point in MaterialApp.builder

tasks.description: Load /sdd/projects only in the bridge/control app context

tasks.title: Load /sdd/project?workspace_path=... for the selected/current project
tasks.description: Load /sdd/project?workspace_path=... for the selected/current project

tasks.title: Load /sdd/project/diagrams?workspace_path=... for diagram source and metadata
tasks.description: Load /sdd/project/diagrams?workspace_path=... for diagram source and metadata

plans.title: Diagram Rendering
plans.description: Render Mermaid diagrams visually in dev mode. The initial target is preview quality, not production diagram publishing. The original `.mmd` file remains the source of truth and rendered output is cache only.

tasks.title: Choose a dev-mode Mermaid rendering approach
tasks.description: Choose a dev-mode Mermaid rendering approach

tasks.title: Render component, deployment, sequence, class, ER, and use case diagrams
tasks.description: Render component, deployment, sequence, class, ER, and use case diagrams

tasks.title: Provide full-screen diagram inspection
tasks.description: Provide full-screen diagram inspection

tasks.title: Let users switch between source and rendered preview
tasks.description: Let users switch between source and rendered preview

tasks.title: Support selecting or marking diagram nodes, edges, and regions
tasks.description: Support selecting or marking diagram nodes, edges, and regions

tasks.title: Treat render failures as validation feedback, not app crashes
tasks.description: Treat render failures as validation feedback, not app crashes

plans.title: Architecture UX
plans.description: Turn the raw explorer into a focused architecture review surface with tabs, status summaries, search, and diagram family navigation.

plans.title: Current Project Dashboard
plans.description: Create a dashboard for the project currently being inspected. In inherited apps, this dashboard must describe only that app/project. The bridge app may still provide project selection because it is the control surface.

tasks.description: Add a project-local dashboard for the current project

tasks.description: Summarize only the current project's specs, diagrams, feedback, and tasks
